top3.sql:
SELECT
    c_birth_year,
    ca_state,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
    catalog_sales
    JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE
    d_moy = 11
    AND d_year = 1999
GROUP BY
    c_birth_year,
    ca_state
ORDER BY
    c_birth_year,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100;
